claim_boundary.what_is_not_supported: a compiler mechanism claim from pass correlation alone, proof of a Qiskit bug, new hidden statistical evidence, simulation or hardware performance, temporal or real-device transfer, route advantage, quantum advantage, BQP separation, solved B4/B8/B10, or new credit
claim_boundary.what_is_supported: an immutable pass-level diagnostic of the public R155 FakeNairobiV2 trial-21 automatic-compilation transient

protocol.capture_rule: record every callback pass row, normalized circuit hash and shape, bounded property-set summary, final OpenQASM 3, process identity, and runtime

classification_rule.first_circuit_divergence: first aligned callback count whose circuit hash differs across final-variant classes
classification_rule.first_property_divergence: first aligned callback count whose bounded property-set summary differs
classification_rule.known_variants_reproduced: both R155 final OpenQASM 3 hashes occur in the 32 immutable processes
classification_rule.new_variant_observed: any final OpenQASM 3 hash falls outside the two R155 hashes
classification_rule.single_variant_nonreproduction: all 32 final OpenQASM 3 hashes are identical

protocol.diagnostic_completion_rule: completion requires all 32 processes and all comparison artifacts; one, two, or more final variants are retained without exclusion
protocol.process_rule: each compilation executes in a distinct operating-system process after public preregistration
protocol.research_question: At which named Qiskit pass does the seeded FakeNairobiV2 trial-21 automatic compilation first split into the R155 OpenQASM 3 variants?

requirements.label: R155 result, classification, comparison, protocol, and contract are hash-bound
the sole R155 mismatch row and its public seed are frozen
32 distinct process compilations are fixed before execution
every pass callback and final OpenQASM 3 artifact is retained
the two R155 final circuit hashes are fixed as known classes
circuit and property-set divergence rules are frozen
diagnostic completion does not depend on reproducing two variants
software, seed, optimization level, and one-thread environment are frozen
no hidden seed, selection, route change, simulation, or sampling is introduced
pass localization is separated from mechanism and scientific-credit claims
